paths.name: react
paths.message: Manual memoization is banned — the React Compiler memoizes automatically (coding-style skill: styles/react.md §1). Keep it only for a useEffect dependency that must stay stable, a value passed to a non-React/third-party library that compares by reference, or measured-expensive work — then opt out with `// eslint-disable-next-line no-restricted-imports -- <reason>`. forwardRef is unnecessary in React 19: accept `ref` as a regular prop.
